name: Daye Table Lamp - 20.5 Inch Height - TBL4605 - Clear/Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Daye table lamp, a blend of elegance and functionality. Standing at 20.5 inches, this lamp features a stunning combination of clear glass and brass finishes, making it a perfect addition to any room. The metal body provides a sleek and modern profile, while the glass shade offers a subtle touch of sophistication, diffusing light beautifully throughout your space. Designed to complement a variety of interiors, this lamp is not just a source of light, but a statement piece that enhances your decor with its refined presence.
